---
name: Bug report
about: Something in testctl broke or behaved wrong
labels: bug
---

**What happened**

**Command used** (e.g. `/testctl:test-all flutter`, `testctl run`)

**Stack(s)** (frappe / flutter / electron / nextjs / supabase)

**Expected vs actual**

**`testctl report` / `TESTCTL_JSON` output (if any)**

**Environment** (OS, Node version, plugin version from `/plugin`)
